# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment documents generated for the current versioned report. Use the links below to navigate the available architecture, dependency, configuration, data, and workflow analyses.

- [Architecture Diagram](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level application layers and component relationships.
- [Dependency Map](./dependency-map.md) - Declared external dependencies grouped by functional category.
- [Api Service Contracts](./api-service-contracts.md) - API surface, management endpoints, DTOs, and communication patterns.
- [Data Architecture](./data-architecture.md) - Persistence model, entity relationships, repositories, and data boundaries.
- [Configuration Inventory](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, properties, and sensitive settings inventory.
- [Business Workflows](./business-workflows.md) - Editorial workflows, domain mapping, and end-to-end business process sequence.
